MaxLineLength:ReportCommand.kt$ReportCommand$throw BadParameterValue("$REPORT_CUSTOM_TEMPLATE or $REPORT_CUSTOM_TEMPLATE_CLASSPATH is required when $REPORT_CUSTOM is true")
